_comment: Claude Code hooks configuration template. Copy relevant sections into ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key.

_notes.SessionStart: Fires before first user message. Output must be valid JSON with 'systemMessage' key.
_notes.PreCompact: Fires BEFORE auto-compaction. Use this to capture full JSONL. Do NOT use PostToolUse (fires after, content already compacted).
_notes.Stop: Fires at session end. Good for backups and summaries. Longer timeout because summarization takes time.
_notes.timeout_guidance: SessionStart: 30s (context injection). PreCompact: 15s (just file copy). Stop: 60s (summarization may take time).
_notes.path_format_windows: On Windows with bash hooks, use forward slashes: D:/path/to/hooks/startup.sh
